cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Mount AI Scholar adapts Google's Gemma-2B architecture to run 100% locally on entry-level student laptops and Chromebooks, delivering high-speed phonics analysis, vocabulary tracking, and reading remediation for dyslexic and learning-disabled students with complete offline data privacy (Privacy by Design).

test_prompts.prompt: Explain the phonetic syllable breakdown of the word 'Spectacle' in French and suggest a mnemonic technique to help a dyslexic child remember its sound structure without letters swapping.
Create a short, engaging phonics-based tongue twister targeting the [ʃ] and [s] sounds in French, structured logically to retrain speech coordination.
